news.t: Cohen & Steers Launches Infrastructure Opportunities and Short Duration Preferred Securities Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: CSIO is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are CSX Corporation stock at 6.52%, The Williams Companies at 5.83%, TC Energy at 5.81%, NextEra Energy at 5.78%, and Entergy at 5.70%.

overview.description: The Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Opportunities Active ETF (CSIO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking total return through investments in infrastructure companies worldwide. The fund utilizes a value-oriented, fundamental approach. CSIO was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by Cohen & Steers.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Launches Infrastructure Opportunities and Short Duration Preferred Securities Active ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK , Dec. 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) is adding to its suite of actively managed exchange-traded funds (ETFs) with the launch of two new strategies: the Cohen & Ste...
